prompt: A cinematic fantasy sports poster featuring a legendary football superstar standing heroically on top of a rugged mountain peak above the clouds. The athlete wears the national team jersey, illuminated by a dramatic golden sunset. Vast fantasy landscapes stretch into the distance with floating islands, ancient castles, monumental landmarks, national flags waving in the wind, glowing particles, storm clouds, and celestial light rays. Powerful brushstroke typography fills the sky behind the player with a bold title such as "THE LEGEND", "THE CAPTAIN", "THE LAST DANCE", or "THE GOLDEN PRODIGY". Dynamic cape-like flag effects flow behind the athlete, creating a mythic champion aura. Hyper-realistic sports photography blended with fantasy concept art, ultra-detailed textures, volumetric lighting, epic atmosphere, cinematic depth, award-winning poster design, dramatic color grading, masterpiece quality, 8K resolution.
